evals.prompt: Write a Riverpod CartNotifier that handles adding products to cart, calculating totals, and applying discounts. Follow XynPOS Flutter patterns.
evals.expected_output: AsyncNotifier or Notifier with proper state, addItem/removeItem/applyDiscount methods, granular providers for total/items separately, Either pattern for error handling.
expectations: Uses Notifier or AsyncNotifier not ChangeNotifier
Has separate providers for cart total (granular)
const constructor on widget classes that use it
No StatelessWidget with ref — uses ConsumerWidget
Proper Either<Failure, T> return on mutations

evals.prompt: The app needs to work when internet is down. How do I make the createTransaction feature work offline in the Flutter app?
evals.expected_output: Explains offline-first flow: generate local_id, save to Hive, update local stock optimistically, try server if online, queue sync via WorkManager if offline.
